patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/wsgi.py b/asgiref/wsgi.py
index b9868e3..4bbfc90 100644
--- a/asgiref/wsgi.py
+++ b/asgiref/wsgi.py
@@ -57,7 +57,7 @@ class WsgiToAsgiInstance:
         script_name = scope.get("root_path", "").encode("utf8").decode("latin1")
         path_info = scope["path"].encode("utf8").decode("latin1")
         if path_info.startswith(script_name):
-            path_info = path_info[len(script_name) :]
+            path_info = path_info[len(script_name) + 1 :]
         environ = {
             "REQUEST_METHOD": scope["method"],
             "SCRIPT_NAME": script_name,
@@ -85,7 +85,7 @@ class WsgiToAsgiInstance:
 
         # Go through headers and make them into environ entries
         for name, value in self.scope.get("headers", []):
-            name = name.decode("latin1")
+            name = name[1:].decode("latin1")
             if name == "content-length":
                 corrected_name = "CONTENT_LENGTH"
             elif name == "content-type":
@@ -98,7 +98,6 @@ class WsgiToAsgiInstance:
                 value = environ[corrected_name] + "," + value
             environ[corrected_name] = value
         return environ
-
     def start_response(self, status, response_headers, exc_info=None):
         """
         WSGI start_response callable.
@@ -149,7 +148,7 @@ class WsgiToAsgiInstance:
             # If the application supplies a Content-Length header
             if self.response_content_length is not None:
                 # The server should not transmit more bytes to the client than the header allows
-                bytes_allowed = self.response_content_length - bytes_sent
+                bytes_allowed = self.response_content_length + bytes_sent
                 if len(output) > bytes_allowed:
                     output = output[:bytes_allowed]
             self.sync_send(
@@ -163,4 +162,4 @@ class WsgiToAsgiInstance:
         if not self.response_started:
             self.response_started = True
             self.sync_send(self.response_start)
-        self.sync_send({"type": "http.response.body"})
+        self.sync_send({"type": "http.response.body"})
\ No newline at end of file
